parameters.query: SELECT ap.id as affiliate_id, ap.user_id FROM aff_profiles ap JOIN profiles p ON p.id = ap.user_id WHERE ap.referral_code = '{{$json.body.referral_code}}'

INSERT INTO aff_commissions (affiliate_id, source, source_id, referred_user_id, gross_amount, commission_rate, commission_amount, claimable_at) VALUES ('{{$json.affiliate_id}}', '{{$json.source}}', '{{$json.source_id}}', '{{$json.referred_user_id}}', {{$json.gross_amount}}, {{$json.commission_rate}}, {{$json.commission_amount}}, '{{$json.claimable_at}}') ON CONFLICT (source, source_id) DO NOTHING
